headline: TEL Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Record Orders & Margin Gains
summary: TE Connectivity tops fiscal Q2 estimates as sales rose 14.5% and orders hit a record $5.3B; fiscal Q3 guidance calls for roughly $5B sales and $2.83 EPS.

raw.headline: TEL Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Record Orders & Margin Gains

headline: 3 Communication Stocks Likely to Benefit Despite Geopolitical Unrest
summary: Increased fiber densification, cloud focus and accelerated pace of 5G deployment should help the Zacks Communication - Components industry thrive despite short-term headwinds. GLW, CIEN and OOMA are well-positioned to make the most of the demand for seamless connectivity solutions.
